insights: The market underwent a significant structural shift around day 17, moving from a ~1000 job baseline to a higher ~1300 job plateau, suggesting a new wave of seasonal hiring or budget releases.
Data engineering and ML roles are showing the most consistent growth, indicating that companies are prioritizing AI-ready infrastructure over generalist roles.

While FAANG+ hiring has softened slightly in the most recent week, the overall volume remains elevated compared to the start of the month, signaling a healthy, sustained appetite for new graduate talent.
